title: Complete iptables Tutorial: Beginner to Advanced
content: Master the Linux firewall from basics to advanced configurations. Learn to protect your server with practical, hands-on examples including installation, rule management, NAT, port forwarding, and security best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Practical Linux Firewalls: iptables, nftables, UFW & firewalld
content: A concise practical guide to Linux firewall tools with commands and example outputs. Covers iptables, nftables, ufw, and firewalld plus best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Complete Guide: Hosting React + PostgreSQL on Local VMs with Internet Access
content: Learn to deploy a full-stack React application with PostgreSQL database on local VMs using VirtualBox, configure firewalls, setup SSH tunnels, port forwarding with TP-Link Deco router, and expose your app to the internet securely with HTTPS.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: PostgreSQL High Availability with Patroni, ETCD, and HAProxy
content: A comprehensive guide to building a production-grade PostgreSQL HA cluster using Patroni for automatic failover, ETCD for distributed consensus, and HAProxy for load balancing. Covers architecture, installation, configuration, monitoring, backup/recovery with pgBackRest, and multi-cluster setups on different ports.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: NGINX Setup & Configuration: The Complete A–Z Guide
content: A step-by-step guide to NGINX covering installation, configuration, static website deployment, React SPA deployment with client-side routing, Next.js deployment (standalone + default mode), reverse proxying, load balancing, SSL/TLS, HTTP/2 & HTTP/3, caching, rate limiting, security headers, WebSocket proxying, Docker deployment, performance tuning, troubleshooting, and production best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Networking for DevOps: The Complete A–Z Guide
content: A comprehensive end-to-end guide to networking for DevOps engineers. Covers OSI model, TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, load balancing, container networking (Docker & Kubernetes), cloud VPC design, troubleshooting tools, monitoring, infrastructure as code, automation, security, and production best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Next.js: The Complete A–Z Guide
content: A comprehensive end-to-end guide to Next.js from fundamentals to production. Covers the App Router, server & client components, data fetching, server actions, routing, middleware, authentication, caching, rendering strategies, deployment, TypeScript, testing, i18n, performance optimization, and production best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: React Native: The Complete A–Z Guide
content: A comprehensive end-to-end guide to React Native from fundamentals to production. Covers core components, styling, flexbox/Yoga, navigation, state management, networking, data persistence, device APIs (camera, location, permissions), animations (Reanimated, Animated API), gestures, forms, debugging, testing, push notifications, performance optimization, TypeScript, publishing to app stores, security, CI/CD, and production best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Testing PostgreSQL High Availability on a Single VM: The Complete Docker Guide
content: Learn how to set up and test a full PostgreSQL High Availability cluster — including Patroni, etcd, and HAProxy — on just one machine using Docker containers. Covers automatic failover, graceful switchover, node recovery, read/write splitting, and three different HA approaches with step-by-step instructions, real commands, and expected outputs.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Expose Your Local Web App to the Internet with Cloudflare Tunnel (Behind CGNAT / No Port Forwarding)
content: A complete step-by-step guide to exposing your locally-hosted web application to the internet without port forwarding, without a static public IP, and even behind CGNAT. Using Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared), you get HTTPS, DDoS protection, and a secure tunnel — all for free.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: IT Infrastructure: Concepts, Design, and Build
content: A comprehensive guide to IT infrastructure covering monolithic, two-tier, and three-tier/multi-tier architectures, network considerations, hardware and VM sizing, data storage strategies, and operating system selection — with practical design patterns, decision criteria, and production-ready best practices for architects, developers, and DevOps engineers.
author: E-Learning Platform

title: Valkey: The Complete A–Z Guide
content: A comprehensive end-to-end guide to Valkey — from fundamentals to production. Covers installation (official + Percona repos), all data types and commands, persistence, replication, high availability, security (ACL/TLS), performance tuning, Valkey 9.x built-in search, use cases (caching, sessions, rate limiting, queues, leaderboards), Docker deployment, monitoring with Prometheus/Grafana, backups, troubleshooting, and production best practices.
author: E-Learning Platform
